description: Spanish language pack for facilities serving Spanish-speaking populations. Provides future UI strings, VistA dialog translations, terminal prompts, and menu translations in Spanish. Spanish is a bounded product language per VE-DISTRO-ADR-0003 (UTF-8 primary lane). This is a planning-stage manifest; no implemented translations exist yet.

dependencies.rationale: English baseline is required. Spanish supplements but does not replace English.

capabilityContributions.description: Spanish language support enhances the language-support capability for facilities serving Spanish-speaking populations. Requires English baseline active.
